texts.orig: Charges are based on occupancy/Number of pax as opposed to number of beds. Extra adult in a room is charged Kshs 3,000 for Bed and Breakfast.

texts.orig: 4. CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.orig:  Reservation fee is Non-Refundable.
texts.text:  Reservation fee is Non-Refundable.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: 2 | P a g e
texts.text: 2 | P a g e

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  DATE CHANGE :  Being an island, a trip to Takawiri is Very intentional and takes time to plan. As such once there is a cancellation it also takes time to get a replacement booking. Kindly therefore notify us change of dates at 7 days  before arrival and we will allow you to rebook with same reservation fee within 12 months, Subject to availability. Deposits not used within 12 months will be forfeited.
texts.text:  DATE CHANGE :  Being an island, a trip to Takawiri is Very intentional and takes time to plan. As such once there is a cancellation it also takes time to get a replacement booking. Kindly therefore notify us change of dates at 7 days  before arrival and we will allow you to rebook with same reservation fee within 12 months, Subject to availability. Deposits not used within 12 months will be forfeited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  LAST MINUTE CANCELLATION - For all cancellations for 7 days or less to the date the reservation fee will be forfeited.
texts.text:  LAST MINUTE CANCELLATION - For all cancellations for 7 days or less to the date the reservation fee will be forfeited.

texts.orig: 6. MEALS
texts.text: 6. MEALS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Breakfast is Mostly  Buffet. Other meals may be ala carte or buffet depending on booking numbers.
texts.text:  Breakfast is Mostly  Buffet. Other meals may be ala carte or buffet depending on booking numbers.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  NB: In the event we have less than 10 guests overall in the premises even breakfast may be ala carte
texts.text:  NB: In the event we have less than 10 guests overall in the premises even breakfast may be ala carte

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: 3 | P a g e
texts.text: 3 | P a g e

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  For Half Board- The Provided Meals will be strictly Dinner and Breakfast.
texts.text:  For Half Board- The Provided Meals will be strictly Dinner and Breakfast.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  WEEKENDS: For Fridays and Saturday bookings will be either Half Board or Full board. No BB Package. This will make our meals management easier as weekend are busy .
texts.text:  WEEKENDS: For Fridays and Saturday bookings will be either Half Board or Full board. No BB Package. This will make our meals management easier as weekend are busy .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  For Full board- All 3 meals will be provided. Lunch will be ala-carte and should be ordered at least one hour in advance.
texts.text:  For Full board- All 3 meals will be provided. Lunch will be ala-carte and should be ordered at least one hour in advance.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Full Board Package DOES NOT include any teas at 10 o'clock and 4pm. This is usually in all-inclusive package which we are currently not offering.
texts.text:  Full Board Package DOES NOT include any teas at 10 o'clock and 4pm. This is usually in all-inclusive package which we are currently not offering.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  FOOD AND DRINKS from outside not allowed in all open spaces i.e rooftop lobby, pool, garden and restaurant . A Corkage fee of Kshs 1,000 per bottle will be automatically billed to anyone found consuming drinks from outside.
texts.text:  FOOD AND DRINKS from outside not allowed in all open spaces i.e rooftop lobby, pool, garden and restaurant . A Corkage fee of Kshs 1,000 per bottle will be automatically billed to anyone found consuming drinks from outside.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7. ROOMS AREA
texts.text: 7. ROOMS AREA

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Kindly maintain silence around the rooms in order not to interfere with the peace of other guests. Loud music is not allowed in the rooms. Those with own Bluetooth speakers to use them inside the rooms (Not Veranda) and at reasonable volume.
texts.text:  Kindly maintain silence around the rooms in order not to interfere with the peace of other guests. Loud music is not allowed in the rooms. Those with own Bluetooth speakers to use them inside the rooms (Not Veranda) and at reasonable volume.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Outdoor Music is only allowed in  our ourdoor entertainment area which is in a separate compound ONLY UP TO 11PM .
texts.text:  Outdoor Music is only allowed in  our ourdoor entertainment area which is in a separate compound ONLY UP TO 11PM .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Our Rooms and Restaurants are strictly NO SMOKING ZONES . Kindly smoke at designated places in the garden/Lake front
texts.text:  Our Rooms and Restaurants are strictly NO SMOKING ZONES . Kindly smoke at designated places in the garden/Lake front

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. PENALTIES AND SURCHARGE
texts.text: 8. PENALTIES AND SURCHARGE

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Permanently stained linen and towels as well as damaged or lost room items, broken cutlery and any other damages will be surcharged at the prevailing market rates + courier fees to enable us replace. This will be automatically billed and payable before guest is cleared for check out.
texts.text:  Permanently stained linen and towels as well as damaged or lost room items, broken cutlery and any other damages will be surcharged at the prevailing market rates + courier fees to enable us replace. This will be automatically billed and payable before guest is cleared for check out.
